title: RNA-seq Library Construction with the KAPA mRNA HyperPrep Kit
author: Amanda Scholes
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.uueewte
materials: Have a thermocycler pre-incubated to desired temperature (placing samples in a cold thermocycler and ramping up to the temperature can cause over fragmentation, as samples are exposed to additional heating as the thermocycler gets up to temperature).
Proceed immediately to 2nd Strand Synthesis and A-tailing.
Using a fresh pipet tip, remove residual ethanol.
Proceed immediately to Library Amplification Cleanup.

steps.title: Resuspend the mRNA Capture Beads (stored...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the mRNA Capture Beads (stored at 4°C) by gently pipetting (try to prevent foaming).

steps.title: For each library, transfer 26
steps.instruction: For each library, transfer 26.25 µL of beads (25 µL x 1.

steps.title: to an RNase-free 1
steps.instruction: to an RNase-free 1.7 mL microcentrifuge tube (up to 24 total reactions per one tube).

steps.title: Place the tube with beads on...
steps.instruction: Place the tube with beads on a Surebeads Magnetic Rack (Bio-Rad #

steps.title: and wait for the sample to clear (~1 min)
steps.instruction: and wait for the sample to clear (~1 min). Carefully pipet and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Carefully resuspend the beads via pipetting...
steps.instruction: Carefully resuspend the beads via pipetting (try to prevent foaming) with equal amount of Bead Binding Buffer (stored at 4°C).

steps.title: Place the tube with beads on...
steps.instruction: Place the tube with beads on the Surebeads Magnetic Rack, wait for sample to clear (~1 min), and carefully pipet and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Carefully resuspend beads via pipetting (try...
steps.instruction: Carefully resuspend beads via pipetting (try to prevent foaming) with equal amount of Bead Binding Buffer (stored at 4°C).

steps.title: Transfer 500 ng of RNA to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 ng of RNA to an RNase-free PCR tube, and bring the volume up to 25 μL with RNase-free water.

steps.title: Add 25 μL of prepped mRNA...
steps.instruction: Add 25 μL of prepped mRNA Capture Beads to PCR tubes containing total RNA. Thoroughly mix via gently pipetting.

steps.title: Place tubes in thermocycler and run
steps.instruction: Place tubes in thermocycler and run: Step Temperature Duration 1st mRNA Capture 65°C 2 min Cool 20°C 5 min

steps.title: Remove tubes and place on magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes and place on magnetic rack (Diagenode # %s %s B

steps.title: and incubate at room temperature (RT)...
steps.instruction: and incubate at room temperature (RT) until sample is clear (~1 min). Use a pipettor to carefully remove supernatant.

steps.title: Remove tubes from rack and gently...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from rack and gently resuspend in 100 μL mRNA Bead Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0.2 mL) and incubate at RT until sample is clear (~1 min). Use a pipettor to carefully remove supernatant.

steps.title: Remove tubes from magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from magnetic rack and gently resuspend in 25 μL RNase-free water.

steps.title: Place tubes in thermocycler and run
steps.instruction: Place tubes in thermocycler and run: Step Temperature Duration 2nd mRNA Capture 70°C 2 min Cool 20°C 5 min

steps.title: Add 25 μL Bead Binding Buffer to the tubes
steps.instruction: Add 25 μL Bead Binding Buffer to the tubes. Mix thoroughly via gentle pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate tubes at 20°C for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at 20°C for 5 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnetic rack and incubate at RT until sample is clear (~1 min). Use a pipettor carefully remove supernatant.

steps.title: Remove tubes from rack and gently...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from rack and gently resuspend in 100 μL mRNA Bead Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Again, place tubes on magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Again, place tubes on magnetic rack and incubate at RT until sample is clear (~1 min). Use a pipettor carefully remove supernatant.

steps.title: Prepare Fragment, Prime, and Elute (FPE) Mastermix
steps.instruction: Prepare Fragment, Prime, and Elute (FPE) Mastermix. FPE Mastermix (per sample, if doing more than one sample make 1.05 times the number of samples) 5.5 μL RNase-Free water 5.5 μL Fragment, Prime, and Elute Buffer (2X) Incubation times and temperatures will vary depending on your desired fragment size. For 100-200 bp, incubate at 94ºC for 8 minutes For 201-300 bp, incubate at 94ºC for 6 minutes For 301-400 bp, incubate at 85ºC for 6 minutes

steps.title: Add 11 μL FPE Mastermix to...
steps.instruction: Add 11 μL FPE Mastermix to each sample and thoroughly resuspend via pipetting. This is a safe stopping point. FPE resuspended samples may be stored at 4ºC ≤ 24 hrs. Freezing samples will damage beads. DO NOT FREEZE.

steps.title: Place ring magnet (Fisher Scientific #A
steps.instruction: Place ring magnet (Fisher Scientific #A

steps.title: Place FPE-resuspended sample tubes in a...
steps.instruction: Place FPE-resuspended sample tubes in a pre-warmed thermocycler and incubate for desired fragment size using a timer (time must be exact. Any longer or shorter will result in differences in fragment sizes).

steps.title: Once the incubation is complete, immediately...
steps.instruction: Once the incubation is complete, immediately place tubes on ring magnet.

steps.title: Using a pipettor, carefully transfer 10...
steps.instruction: Using a pipettor, carefully transfer 10 μL supernatant to a fresh RNase-free PCR tube.

steps.title: Place tube on ice and proceed...
steps.instruction: Place tube on ice and proceed immediately to 1st Strand Synthesis.

steps.title: Prepare 1st Strand Synthesis Mastermix
steps.instruction: Prepare 1st Strand Synthesis Mastermix. 1st Strand Synthesis Mastermix (per sample, if doing more than one sample make 1.05 times the number of samples) 5.5 μL 1st Strand Synthesis Buffer 0.5 μL KAPA Script

steps.title: Add 5 μL 1st Strand Synthesis...
steps.instruction: Add 5 μL 1st Strand Synthesis Mastermix to the tube containing 10 μL fragmented RNA.

steps.title: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting
steps.instruction: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Place tubes in a thermocycler and run
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a thermocycler and run: Step Temperature Duration Primer Extension 25ºC 10 min 1st Strand Synthesis 42ºC 15 min Enzyme Inactivation 70ºC 15 min HOLD 4ºC ∞

steps.title: Place tubes on ice
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ice.

steps.title: Prepare 2nd Strand Synthesis and A-tailing Mastermix
steps.instruction: Prepare 2nd Strand Synthesis and A-tailing Mastermix. 2nd Strand Synthesis Mastermix (per sample, if doing more than one sample make 1.05 times the number of samples) 15.5 μL 1st Strand Synthesis Buffer 1 μL KAPA Script

steps.title: Add 15 μL 2nd Strand Synthesis...
steps.instruction: Add 15 μL 2nd Strand Synthesis Mastermix to the tube containing 15 μL 1st Strand Synthesized samples.

steps.title: Place tubes in a thermocycler and run
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a thermocycler and run: Step Temperature Duration 2nd Strand Synthesis 16ºC 30 min A-tailing 62ºC 10 min HOLD 4ºC ∞

steps.title: Place tubes on ice
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ice.

steps.title: Dilute Adapters
steps.instruction: Dilute Adapters. Dilute adapters according to quantity of starting RNA concentration. Quantity of RNA Adapter stock concentration 50 ηg - 499 ng 1.5 μM 500 ηg - 1000ng 7 μM I stared with 500 ng of total RNA and used 1.5 μM adapter concentration.

steps.title: Prepare Adapter Ligation Mastermix
steps.instruction: Prepare Adapter Ligation Mastermix. Adapter Ligation Mastermix (per sample, if doing more than one sample make 1.05 times the number of samples) 20 μL Ligation Buffer (viscous, pipet slowly) 5 μL DNA Ligase

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 μL diluted adapters to 30 μL 2nd Strand Synthesized samples.

steps.title: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting
steps.instruction: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Add 22
steps.instruction: Add 22.5 μL Adapter Ligation Mastermix to the 32.5 μL adapter containing 2nd Strand Synthesis samples.

steps.title: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting
steps.instruction: Keeping tubes on ice, gently mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at 20ºC for 15 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20ºC for 15 min.

steps.title: Add 35 μL KAPA Pure Beads...
steps.instruction: Add 35 μL KAPA Pure Beads to 55 μL Adapter ligated samples and mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 5 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164)
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164). Incubate until liquid is clear (~1 min).

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip (see "Before Start" in Guidelines & Warnings).

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Dry beads at RT for 5...
steps.instruction: Dry beads at RT for 5 min (over-drying beads may reduce library yield).

steps.title: Remove tubes from ring magnet
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from ring magnet.

steps.title: Using a pipettor thoroughly resuspend beads...
steps.instruction: Using a pipettor thoroughly resuspend beads in 25 μL RNase-Free 10 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0-8.5).

steps.title: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min. This is a safe stopping point. Resuspended beads can be stored at 4ºC for ≤24hrs. DO NOT FREEZE beads, as this will cause dramatic loss of DNA.

steps.title: Add 17
steps.instruction: Add 17.5 μL PEG/NaCl to 25 μL 1st Post-ligation cleaned samples and mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 5 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164)
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164). Incubate until liquid is clear (~1 min).

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Dry beads at RT for 5...
steps.instruction: Dry beads at RT for 5 min (over-drying beads may reduce library yield).

steps.title: Remove tubes from magnet
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from magnet.

steps.title: Using a pipettor, thoroughly resuspend beads...
steps.instruction: Using a pipettor, thoroughly resuspend beads in 11 μL RNase-Free 10 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0-8.5).

steps.title: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0.2mL). Incubate until liquid is clear (~1 min).

steps.title: Transfer the liquid (10 μL) to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the liquid (10 μL) to a new RNase-Free PCR tube, being careful to not transfer any beads. This is a safe stopping point. Eluted libraries can be stored at 4ºC for ≤1 week or at -20ºC for ≤1 month.

steps.title: Prepare Library Amplification Mastermix
steps.instruction: Prepare Library Amplification Mastermix. Library Amplification MAstermix 12.5 μL KAPA HiFi HotStart ReadyMix 2.5 μL Library Amplifcation Primer Mix For 500 ng starting RNA, 9 cycles worked well. This should be determined empirically.

steps.title: Add 15 μL Library Amplification Mastermix...
steps.instruction: Add 15 μL Library Amplification Mastermix to 10 μL 2nd Post-ligation cleaned samples. Mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Place samples in thermocycler and run
steps.instruction: Place samples in thermocycler and run: Step Temperature Duration Cycles Intial Denaturation 98ºC 45 sec 1 Denaturation 98ºC 15 sec \ Annealing 60ºC 30 sec 9 Extension 72ºC 30 sec / Final Extension 72ºC 1 min 1 HOLD 4ºC ∞

steps.title: Add 25 μL KAPA Pure Beads...
steps.instruction: Add 25 μL KAPA Pure Beads to 25 μL Library Amplified samples and mix thoroughly via pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 5 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164)
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ring magnet (Fisher #A29164). Incubate until liquid is clear (~1 min).

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Carefully, dispense 100 μL 80% ethanol into the tube, making sure to not touch the tube with the pipet tip

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 30 sec.

steps.title: Carefully, without touching the beads, use...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without touching the beads, use a pipettor to remove the supernatant (using Avant #AH200-H - skinnier tips than normal barrier tips).

steps.title: Dry beads at RT for 5...
steps.instruction: Dry beads at RT for 5 min (over-drying beads may reduce library yield).

steps.title: Remove tubes from ring magnet
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from ring magnet.

steps.title: Using a pipettor thoroughly resuspend beads...
steps.instruction: Using a pipettor thoroughly resuspend beads in 11 μL RNase-Free 10 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0-8.5).

steps.title: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnetic rack (0.2 mL). Incubate until liquid is clear (~1 min).

steps.title: Transfer clear (no beads) 10 μL...
steps.instruction: Transfer clear (no beads) 10 μL to a new RNase-Free PCR tube. RNA-Seq library is completed. Quantify and check quality using an Agilent TapeStation or BioAnalyzer.
